<html>DOWNLOADING, INSTALLING, OR USING THE CISCO PACKET TRACER SOFTWARE CONSTITUTES ACCEPTANCE OF THE CISCO END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT("EULA" https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/about/legal/cloud-and-software/end_user_license_agreement.html) AND THE SUPPLEMENTAL END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT FOR CISCO PACKET TRACER ("SEULA" https://www.cisco.com/c/dam/en_us/about/doing_business/legal/seula/cisco-packet-tracer-software.pdf). IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO ALL OF THE TERMS OF THE EULA AND SEULA, THEN CISCO SYSTEMS, INC. ("CISCO") IS UNWILLING TO LICENSE THE SOFTWARE TO YOU AND YOU ARE NOT AUTHORIZED TO DOWNLOAD, INSTALL OR USE THE SOFTWARE.</html>
